sizing_rule.note: Trade 1 unit per $50,000 of account equity. Equivalent to risking ~2% per unit on standard 1:1 risk/reward. Scales position size proportionally with equity growth/drawdown via equity divisor mechanism.

source_rule_text: Scale position size proportionally to account equity by trading one unit for every fixed dollar amount of total account capital, ensuring risk exposure remains consistent as equity grows or shrinks.
